description: Lorikeet is an AI customer support platform for complex and regulated businesses. It provides AI agents for voice, chat, and email workflows, along with tooling for workflow configuration, testing, and operational analysis.
summary: Lorikeet exposes a documented MCP server at `https://api.lorikeetcx.ai/v1/mcp` plus public integration pages for a Lorikeet API and SDK/REST API; public docs do not expose machine-readable specs or concrete REST auth mechanics.
